[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Planar Graphs]]Adding diagrams with visual editor for explanation


== Loops and Parallel lines ==


You cannot make a graph non-planar by adding loops or parallel connections because you can always draw the loop so it does not cross other lines or draw the parallel connections next to it[[File:Planar_example.jpg|thumb]]
[[File:Planar_definition.jpg|thumb]]

==Euler's Formula==
{{Main|Euler's Formula}}
[[File:Eulers formula.jpg|thumb|Eulers formula]]




== Other files ==
[[File:K5.jpg|thumb|K5]]
[[File:Attempt.jpg|thumb|Attempt]]
[[Category:Graph Theory]]


[[File:K33 is not planar.jpg|thumb|K33 is not planar]]
[[File:K5 is not planar.jpg|thumb|K5 is not planar]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
